MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DYLAN WILLIAMS. ESQ., 866.563.0809 X23812, FOR PLAINTIFF ASSETT ACCEPTANCE, LLC.
MICHAEL RAYSOR, ESQ., 415.277.7211, FOR DEFENDANT LUISA VASQUEZ.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: Defendant LUISA VASQUEZ'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS Granted. The default judgment entered May 13, 2013 is set aside and service of summons on plaintiff is quashed. ANSWER WILL BE FILED WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185
